title: Wer 4 Sind - 30 Jahre Die Fantastischen Vier
overview: What is the secret of Germany's most successful hip-hop band? What makes them different? How did they make their mark in German pop culture and develop over the years? A behind-the-scenes look at a band that has written German music history and continues to do so.
